title: S + V + N + whose + N + V

formulas.zh: 名詞 + 所有格關係代名詞whose + 名詞 + 動詞，表示「其……」或「……的」
名詞 + whose + 名詞 + 是 + 形容詞/名詞，whose引導的子句中whose + N作主詞

explanation: whose是所有格關係代名詞，用於連接主句與描述性子句，表達所有權或關係。whose + N的結構可在子句中作主詞或受詞。可修飾人或物，具有靈活性。常見用法為whose + N作主詞，whose + N被動詞修飾；或whose + N作受詞，被另一動詞修飾。注意whose後直接跟名詞（不加冠詞），且子句內動詞須與whose + N的數保持一致。易混淆點：勿與who's（who is）混淆。

examples.eng: The author whose novel won the award gave an inspiring speech.
examples.chi: 其小說獲獎的作家發表了一場振奮人心的演講。

examples.eng: I met a girl whose parents are both doctors working in the hospital.
examples.chi: 我遇見一個女孩，她的父母都是在醫院工作的醫生。

examples.eng: The company whose products I use has excellent customer service.
examples.chi: 我使用其產品的那家公司擁有卓越的客戶服務。

examples.eng: Students whose test scores exceeded the standard were awarded scholarships.
examples.chi: 考試成績超過標準的學生被頒發獎學金。

extension.tip: 判斷whose引導的子句：先找出被修飾的名詞，再確認whose後的名詞與子句動詞的搭配。若whose + N為複數，動詞應用複數形。避免用which's或who's替代whose，保持句式正確性。

examples.test: 正確：The student whose homework was submitted late explained the reason.
examples.result: → homework作主詞，was submitted為被動語態，whose修飾student

examples.test: 錯誤：The student which homework was submitted late explained the reason.
正確：The scientist whose discovery changed medicine received the Nobel Prize.
examples.result: → whose + discovery在子句中作主詞，表「其發現」

extension.note: whose一定是所有格，whose後直接跟名詞，子句動詞與whose + N的數一致。

parts: class performed best in the competition was very proud.
exercises.sentence: The teacher whose class performed best in the competition was very proud.
exercises.translation: 其班級在比賽中表現最好的老師感到非常驕傲。

parts: collection includes priceless artworks from different periods.
exercises.sentence: We visited the museum whose collection includes priceless artworks from different periods.
exercises.translation: 我們參觀了一座其收藏品包括不同時期無價藝術品的博物館。

parts: record was broken last week congratulated the new champion.
exercises.sentence: The athlete whose record was broken last week congratulated the new champion.
exercises.translation: 其紀錄上週被打破的運動員為新冠軍致敬。

exercises.sentence: They are looking for volunteers whose languages include Mandarin and English.
exercises.translation: 他們在尋找其語言包括普通話和英文的志願者。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選出正確的關係代名詞片語，完成有關作者與作品的句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: The writer _______ books have sold millions of copies is giving a lecture tomorrow.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。whose是所有格關係代名詞，可修飾人或物，後接名詞books。B選項who's是「who is」的縮寫，不符合語法。C和D無法表達所有權關係。句子意思：「這位作品銷售數百萬冊的作家明天要舉辦講座。」

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據句意選出正確的所有格關係代名詞與其搭配
mc_exercises.question_eng: I visited the museum _______ collection includes rare artifacts from ancient Egypt.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。whose直接修飾後面的名詞collection，表示「該博物館的收藏」。B選項whose's形成雙重所有格，文法錯誤。C選項「of which」雖然可表所有權但結構不同。D選項that's是「that is」，無法表達所有權。whose + N結構簡潔有力。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷複合句中whose子句的主詞與動詞數字一致性
mc_exercises.question_eng: The companies _______ CEO attended the conference presented their innovative strategies.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。whose修飾CEO（單數），後接單數動詞attended，符合數字一致性。B選項who用於人的主格，但此處需要所有格。C選項which用於物，不能修飾CEO屬於企業的概念。D選項whose's形成雙重所有格錯誤。句意：「出席會議的這些公司的執行長展示了創新策略。」

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的所有格關係代名詞，並注意whose後名詞的數與子句動詞的配合
mc_exercises.question_eng: The students _______ research projects were selected for the national competition have been working diligently for months.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。whose修飾複數名詞projects，配合複數動詞were selected。注意whose直接跟名詞，不需冠詞。B選項whose's為雙重所有格錯誤。C選項「of whom」無法指涉projects（物），且結構不符。D選項their是代名詞，無法引導關係子句。此句whose + N（projects）作受詞被動詞selected修飾。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我喜歡那位老師，她的課程很有趣。
translation_exercises.answer: I like the teacher whose classes are interesting.
key_points: whose classes（所有格關係代名詞+名詞）
hints: 句型框架：I like N + whose + N + V
注意：whose後直接跟名詞classes，不需加冠詞a/the

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我認識一位學生，他的父親是醫生。
translation_exercises.answer: I know a student whose father is a doctor.
key_points: whose father（所有格關係代名詞+單數名詞）
is a doctor（單數動詞is與father一致）
hints: 句型框架：I know N + whose + N + be + N
常見錯誤：誤寫成whose's father或whose he father

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我們學校有很多學生，他們的夢想是進入頂尖大學。
translation_exercises.answer: Our school has many students whose dreams are to enter top universities.
key_points: are to enter（複數動詞與dreams一致）
to enter（不定詞片語作表語）
hints: 句型框架：N + whose + N (複數) + V (複數)
注意whose後的名詞dreams為複數，動詞are須配合複數形式

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這是一部我非常欣賞的電影，它的導演曾獲得多項國際獎項。
translation_exercises.answer: This is a movie whose director has won numerous international awards, which I admire very much.
key_points: whose director（所有格關係代名詞修飾人物）
hints: 句型框架：This is N + whose + N + V + O，whose可修飾人或物
易混淆：whose修飾的是director（導演），而非movie本身；whose後跟名詞，不是who
